lines.speaker: Polly
lines.text: Squawk! Leave me alone, bird! I'm trying to have a drink!

lines.speaker: Polly
lines.text: Squawk! She's pecking my peg leg!

lines.speaker: Polly
lines.text: Squawk! Ow! That was my finger! Stupid bird!

lines.speaker: Polly
lines.text: Squawk! Steve! That bird is trying to drink the grog again!

lines.speaker: Polly
lines.text: Squawk! Please stop! I'm sorry I called you a pigeon!
